title: Restoned
description: Adds missing stone blocks for all awalable stone types
body:
_This mod uses a modified version of Fabric (Babric) and is designed only for Better than Adventure, a heavily modified version of Minecraft b1.7.3! For more information, join the discord server provided on this projects page._

### Restoned is a simple mod that adds some missing stone blocks for every stone type.

## Currently adds:
- Cobbled stones for marble, slate
- Mossy cobbled stones for basalt, limestone, granite, marble, slate, permafrost
- Pillars for stone, basalt, limestone, granite, slate, permafrost, netherrack
- Cobbled stone slabs for marble, slate
- Polished stone slabs for marble, slate
- Capstone slabs for stone, basalt, limestone, granite, slate, permafrost, netherrack
- Cobbled stone stairs for marble, slate
- Brick stairs for marble
- Polished stone for marble 

And will add much more in the future
